scripts.build:css: sass client/admin/src/scss/map-field.scss client/admin/dist/map-field.css --no-source-map && sass client/admin/src/scss/address-grid.scss client/admin/dist/address-grid.css --no-source-map
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.watch: npm run watch:js & npm run watch:css
